title: teucrium polium subsp. latifolium
intro: Teucrium polium subsp. latifolium, also known as the broad-leaved teucrium or broad-leaved germander, is a subspecies of the Teucrium polium plant, which is a species of flowering plant in the mint family. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its essential oils, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Teucrium polium subsp. latifolium include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Teucrium polium subsp. latifolium can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
